results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_48', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a2.m1.s2c1', 'new_EK_PORT_48', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': graph_json,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object
